---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the OVATE Security website
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What user need does it address?

*Example: "When viewing on mobile, the services section is hard to navigate because..."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? If so, describe them.

## Design Mockups / References

If you have wireframes, mockups, or reference sites, please attach or link them here.

## Impact Assessment

- [ ] This change affects the visual layout
- [ ] This change requires new JavaScript logic
- [ ] This change affects SEO / meta tags
- [ ] This change requires new assets (images, icons, fonts)
- [ ] This change affects mobile layout
- [ ] This change is a content update only

## Additional Context

Add any other context, research, or background information here.

## Priority

- [ ] Low — Nice to have
- [ ] Medium — Would improve user experience
- [ ] High — Needed for business goals
